prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **GM L31 Vortec 5.7L V8 (350ci, 255hp stock)** with a **Holley Sniper EFI 2300** standalone ECU, paired with a **Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission** and a **McLeod RST twin-disc clutch** for improved torque handling. The L31 features **ARP head studs**, **Fel-Pro MLS head gaskets**, and a **Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 268 camshaft** (224°/230° duration, 0.501”/0.510” lift) for optimized mid-range power.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT3076R turbocharger** (0.82 A/R turbine housing) running **12 psi of boost** on a **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust** with a **Borla Pro XS muffler**. The turbo setup includes a **Turbonetics Deltagate 40 wastegate**, **Tial MV-R blow-off valve**, and a **Pacesetter 4-2-1 header** with **304 stainless steel tubing** to maximize exhaust scavenging. Intercooling is handled by a **GReddy Type-S front-mount intercooler** with **4-inch silicone couplers** and a **SPAL 16-inch puller fan** for consistent intake temps.

Suspension overhaul with **King Off-Road 2.5-inch Remote Reservoir Shocks** (10-inch travel) paired with **Total Chaos Fabrication +3-inch long-travel upper A-arms** and **Poly Performance rear trailing arms**. The front sway bar is replaced with a **Currie Enterprises 1.25-inch adjustable sway bar**, while the rear receives a **custom-fabricated 1-inch solid sway bar** to reduce body roll. Braking is upgraded to **Wilwood Dynalite 6-piston calipers** (13-inch rotors) up front and **Wilwood Superlite 4-piston calipers** (12-inch rotors) in the rear, with **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines** and **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** for fade resistance.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a **Rusty Knuckle Off-Road Tracker-specific fiberglass kit**, extending fenders by **3.5 inches per side** to accommodate **35x12.50R17 BFGoodrich KM3 tires** on **Method MR701 beadlock wheels** (17x9, +12mm offset). The rear quarter panels are reinforced with **custom steel tube fender flares** for durability during off-road abuse.

Front-end refresh with a **Rally Armor UR Mud Flaps** set, **PIAA 520 Series LED light bar** (20-inch, 10,000-lumen) mounted to a **Slee Off-Road steel bumper**, and a **C4 Fabworks winch mount** housing a **Warn Zeon 10-S winch** with **synthetic rope**. The hood is replaced with a **custom aluminum vented hood** (hand-fabricated) to improve engine bay airflow, featuring a **carbon fiber scoop** for the intercooler.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a **Sparco Pro ADV seat** (fixed-back, FIA-approved) mounted on a **Custom Cages bolt-in harness bar** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**. The dash is replaced with a **Racepak IQ3 digital dash** displaying boost, AFR, and oil pressure, while the steering wheel is swapped for a **NRG Innovations 350mm suede wheel** on a **Tilton quick-release hub**. The rear cargo area is fitted with a **custom aluminum storage system** for tools and recovery gear, lined with **BedRug truck bed mat** for durability.
